boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact EHS execution release present in source records
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-NOV-042-P requires exact EHS execution release match (chemical, quantity, facility, PO) before purchase order issuance; EHS-NOV-042 shows release unscheduled
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: STD-NOV-042-P mandates EHS execution release match before PO issuance; EHS-NOV-042 confirms release remains to be scheduled
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: EHS execution release dependency is open; no scheduled release exists in source records to authorize PO issuance

critical_features_preserved: Exact policy boundary rule from STD-NOV-042-P
Source boundary remains open until EHS release occurs
No substitution of adjacent sources as execution authority
final_answer: The purchase order cannot be issued. STD-NOV-042-P requires an exact EHS execution release match before PO issuance for controlled solvents. EHS-NOV-042 confirms the purchase execution release for NS-55 remains to be scheduled. SRC-NOV-042 authorizes only supplier quote collection. PO-NOV-042 documents the proposed purchase but cannot be issued until the required EHS execution release occurs. Escalate due to open timing and authority dependency on unscheduled EHS release.
open_blockers: Release must match chemical, quantity, facility, and PO before issuance
